reason: Stage 3 early capture starts with OP/EPS/FCF, ROE, AFFO, or OPM bodyweight change.
Contracts, customers, amount, duration, backlog, royalty, ARR/bookings, NOI/AFFO, prescriptions, repeat revenue, and equity-method income must be visible.
Stage 2/3 must be checked against event returns, MFE/MAE, relative strength, and volume spike.
Long-term contracts, recurring software, repeat procedures, shareholder returns, occupancy, renewal, and repeat consumption separate structure from event.
PF, safety, legal, cyber, policy reversal, contract cancellation, CRL/patent/CMC, accounting, and audit issues block unsafe Green.
OpenDART detail, contract details, customer, amount, duration, and routine disclosure filtering set confidence.
Good structures with crowded price paths need 4B monitoring rather than fresh Green promotion.
